title: 在長白山滑雪⛷️，個雪景好靚😍

replies.msg: My girlfriend and I are on a skiing holiday in Changbai Mountain. We’re staying in a hotel nearby which overlooks the ski park. Changbai Mountain is indeed a resort of outstanding scenic beauty. This is what our hotel looks out on:
It’s like something out of a children’s book. The view our hotel looks on to is spectacular.

wow that looks like in Northern Europe!

Welcome to join us in the biggest Ski/Snowboard club in HK:
www.facebook.com/groups/shfssc

It’s not Northern Europe 🤣 what the....
It’s changbai mountain in China. Have you ever been there before?
